data.description:
## Purpose

This is a synthetic test ticket created to exhaustively verify bidirectional Jira ↔ tickets branch sync (bug 44a0-3a13 verification).

## Fields to verify

- title/summary
- description (this text)
- priority (2 = medium)
- assignee
- status

## Expected outcome

This ticket should appear in Jira project DIG with all fields populated. Each subsequent edit should propagate to Jira via the outbound bridge.
data.title: [bridge-sync-verify]: Bidirectional sync verification test ticket
